title: Inaugural Strike
note: First aluminium poured in the Loshult garden. Small mintage, rough edges, much learning. Planchets cast from Carlsberg, Tuborg, and the occasional contraband Pripps.

title: The Standard Year
note: The One Bral reaches its canonical form. Portraits of obverse and reverse, photographed by M.B. Jensen, become the official reference specimen.

title: The October Strike
note: Larger denominations (Half Keg, Full Keg) require a longer cool and heavier planchets. A single pour is scheduled for autumn, weather permitting.
